2605.00539.title: AGoQ: Activation and Gradient Quantization for Memory-Efficient Distributed Training of LLMs
2605.00539.paper_summary: Quantization is a key method for reducing the GPU memory requirement of training large language models (LLMs). Yet, current approaches are ineffective for 4-bit activations and 8-bit gradients, which would easily cause slow convergence or accuracy loss. To address this, we introduce AGoQ, incorporating two new techniques: 1) a layer-aware activation quantization algorithm that allocates appropriate bit-widths for activations of various layers based on their types and pipeline stages to achieve near 4-bit activation storage, and 2) a gradient quantization algorithm that reduces memory usage and shortens communication time by employing 8-bit gradient storage and precision-preserving 8-bit All-Reduce communication. We conduct extensive experiments using different sizes of LLMs on two GPU clusters (up to 64 GPUs), and the experimental results show that our AGoQ reduces the memory by up to 52\% and achieves up to 1.34$\times$ improvement of training speed compared to state-of-the-art training systems Megatron-LM (w/ or w/o ZeRO), COAT and DeepSpeed with 8B to 32B LLaMA models, while achieving convergence loss on pretraining and comparable accuracy on downstream tasks with LLaMA architectures.
2605.00539.paper_summary_zh: 量化是減少訓練大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的 GPU 記憶體需求的關鍵方法。<lb/>然而，目前的方法對於 4 位元的激活和 8 位元的梯度效果不佳，這可能會導致收斂速度緩慢或準確性損失。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了 AGoQ，結合了兩種新技術：1) 一種層感知的激活量化算法，根據不同層的類型和管道階段為激活分配適當的位寬，以實現接近 4 位元的激活存儲；2) 一種梯度量化算法，通過使用 8 位元的梯度存儲和保持精度的 8 位元全減法通訊來減少記憶體使用和縮短通訊時間。<lb/>我們在兩個 GPU 集群（最多 64 個 GPU）上使用不同大小的 LLM 進行了廣泛的實驗，實驗結果顯示，我們的 AGoQ 將記憶體減少了最多 52\%，並實現了與最先進的訓練系統 Megatron-LM（有或沒有 ZeRO）、COAT 和 DeepSpeed 相比，訓練速度提高了最多 1.34$\times$，同時在預訓練上實現了收斂損失，並在下游任務上與 LLaMA 架構達成了相當的準確性。
2605.00539.author: Wenxiang Lin et.al.
2605.00539.authors: Wenxiang Lin, Juntao Huang, Luhan Zhang, Laili Li, Xiang Bao, Mengyang Zhang, Bing Wang, Shaohuai Shi
